specific_question: Which specialty product category generated the highest search system load on Lee’s Market’s website during September 2025?
answer: Internal system analytics show that imported kimchi varieties accounted for 18% of all search queries in September 2025, occasionally slowing the site’s autocomplete response time for users in San Francisco and Toronto.
